docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, LOWELL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF LOWELL WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARRYL HUNTER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHELIA HUNTER IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JO BIEL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DARRYL HUNTER. COURT DISMISSED DEFENDANT DARRYL HUNTER WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF LOWELL WILLIAMS. COURTS ORDERS DEFENDANT SHELIA HUNTER TO OBTAIN AND PROVIDE DOCUMENT TO COURT WITHIN 30 DAYS A BETTER BREAKDOWN OF DOCUMENT TO SHOW IF PLAINTIFF'S MONEY WAS EVER COVERED BY SF HOUSING AUTHORITY PAID. DEFENDANT TO MAIL THE DOCUMENT TO CLERK'S OFFICE FOR FURTHER CONSIDERATION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE RECEIVED AND FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDGE TO REVIEW.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED); REMARKS: PER TIM FINCH(UNION DIRECTOR), THE RESPONDENT SHEILA HUNTER IS NOT A UNION MEMBER AND HE COULD NOT PROVIDE ANY INFORMATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, LOWELL AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, SHELIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-06-2023 REMAINS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT WITH MODIFICATIONS. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE: HONORABLE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. CLERK: L. BARENG. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D303)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, LOWELL AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, DARRYL HUNTER, SHELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, LOWELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTER, SHELIA $1,243.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,283.00, HUNTER SHALL (1) PAY WILLIAMS $1,243 WHICH IS THE REMAINING RENT OVERPAYMENT MINUS RENT DEFICIENCY DEDUCTIONS FOR SEPT. 2022-JAN. 2023 RENTS OWED AND (2) PAY DIRECTLY TO THE COURT $40 COURT COSTS SINCE WILLIAMS WAS GRANTED A FEE WAIVER. *EXPANDED TEXT - SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STATEMENT OF DECISION (SOD). calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Defendant/Appellant, Sheila Hunter, the moving party is present in pro per, placed under oath and testified. Darryl Hunter is also present, placed under oath but did not testify.
Plaintiff/Respondent Lowell Williams, the opposing party is present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo on Appeal from Small Claims Court. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent, Lowell Williams testifies on his own behalf. The following exhibits are presented/reviewed:
Exhibit #1: Costs Receipts (original returned)
Exhibit #2: Letter, print date November 9, 2022 - Rent Change Notification
Exhibit #3: Stack of Letter Correspondence between Mr. Williams and Ms. Hunter
Exhibit #4: Letter from Mr. Williams to Ms. Hunter
Exhibit #5: Photographs of the yard (returned)
Exhibit #6: Stack of Photographs dated Monday, June 6, 2016 (returned)

Defendant/Appellant, Sheila Hunter testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibits are presented/reviewed:
Exhibit A: Rental Assistance Email
Exhibit B: Correspondence from Ms. Hunter to Ms. Williams with copies of Money Orders
Exhibit C: Letter from Ms. Hunter to Ms. Williams dated December 31, 2022

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. The Court will issue a written judgment.

Trial concludes and court is adjourned.

Judge: Honorable Suzanne Ramos Bolanos. Clerk: L. Bareng. Proceedings Not Reported. (D303)
